channel.title: Company press releases
channel.description: Fixture for official Euronext listed-company press releases.

item.title: Instabank ASA - Sale of option shares by primary insiders
item.description:
Instabank ASA - Sale of option shares by primary insiders Stocks Oslo Instabank ASA
English

Reference is made to Instabank ASA's stock exchange announcement regarding exercise of share options by primary insiders.
item.dc:creator: Euronext

item.title: VAN DE VELDE : Acquisition of treasury shares
item.description:
VAN DE VELDE : Acquisition of treasury shares Stocks Brussels Van De Velde
English

Press release on the acquisition of treasury shares by a listed issuer.
item.dc:creator: Euronext
